query:
SELECT r.questionId, r.response, r.fileUrl, r.createdAt
FROM responses r
JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id
WHERE (o.name LIKE '%RRMC%' OR o.slug LIKE '%rrmc%')
AND r.questionId IN ('D.13', 'D.14', 'D.15', 'D.16', 'D.17');
